provisions.content:
INNOVATIVE TECHNOLOGY ARRANGEMENTS AND
SERVICES (ITAS) CERTIFICATION

[ L.S.591.01

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 591.01
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INNOVATIVE TECHNOLOGY
ARRANGEMENTS AND SERVICES (ITAS)
CERTIFICATION
14 ta’ Ġunju, 2024

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 132 tal-2024.

Dawn ir regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-Ilslien Ingliż biss.
